cssRules.css: a.link:hover, a.linker:hover { color: rgb(45, 86, 177); transition: color 0.3s ease-out; }
.aui-button:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(242, 70, 81); border-color: rgb(242, 70, 81); }
#region-select .aui-btn-white:hover { color: rgb(228, 30, 43); border-color: rgb(228, 30, 43); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }
.aui-btn-white:active, .aui-btn-white:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(239, 50, 62); border-color: rgb(239, 50, 62); }
.cui-btn-outline-primary:hover, .cui-btn-outline-primary .hover { border-color: rgb(246, 111, 106); background-color: rgb(246, 111, 106); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }
.button.disable, .button.disable:active, .button.disable:hover { background: rgb(239, 239, 239); border-color: rgb(239, 239, 239); color: rgb(204, 204, 204); cursor: default; }
.navigation .nav .nav-item a:hover, .navigation .nav .nav-item.selected a { color: rgb(228, 30, 43); font-weight: bold; }
#nav-main { position: relative; height: 0px; width: 1410px; margin: 0px auto; overflow: hidden; max-width: 1410px; }
.lang-list .lang-item.active::after, .lang-list .lang-item:hover::after { content: ""; position: absolute; right: 0px; height: 20px; top: 10px; border-right: 3px solid rgb(228, 31, 43); }
.sidebar-box.fixed { background: none; z-index: 100; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 860px; margin-left: -500px; left: 50%; top: 0px; }

.navigation .subnav-layer, .navigation .nav-item:hover > .subnav-layer { position: static; height: auto; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; box-shadow: none; display: none; width: 100%; margin: 0px; }
.home-popup-window { position: absolute; inset: 0px; width: 1062px; height: 585px; margin: auto; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); }
.eco-dialog footer button:hover { background-color: rgb(89, 89, 89); border: 1px solid rgb(89, 89, 89); }

.cloud-host-page[data-v-73233988] .cloud-host-dialog-inner[data-v-73233988] { padding: 32px; position: relative; box-sizing: border-box; max-height: calc(-50px + 100vh); overflow: auto; width: 700px; border-radius: 8px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; }
.protocol-btn-black:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; background-color: rgb(137, 137, 137) !important; border-color: rgb(137, 137, 137) !important; }

.marketplace-sidebar .marketplace-sidebar-inner .marketplace-float-config .float-config-star .float-config-star-expand .star-btn-wrapper .btn-cancel:hover { background: rgb(243, 243, 243); border: 1px solid rgb(216, 216, 216); color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }
.por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled + span, .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled:hover + span { border-color: rgb(223, 225, 230); background-color: rgb(238, 240, 245); }

cssRules.selector: .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled + span i, .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled:hover + span i
cssRules.css: .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled + span i, .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled:hover + span i { color: rgb(223, 225, 230); }
.por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:focus + span, .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover + span { border-color: rgb(173, 176, 184) !important; }
.footer-service .footer-service-wrapper > ul > li > a:hover > h2 { color: rgb(25, 25, 25); font-weight: 600; text-decoration: underline; }

cssRules.selector: .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active span, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover span
cssRules.css: .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active span, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover span { color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }
.header-mbshearch-droplist a:active i, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover i { border-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }
